basic_details.job_title: CRPF Constable Tradesman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 9195 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) has officially released a recruitment notification for Constable Tradesman . For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 08-04-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: 20-04-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 19-05-2026

age_limit.details: Age Limit for Constable (Driver): 21-27 Years Constable (Motor Mechanic Vehicle / Cobbler / Carpenter / Tailor / Brass Band / Pipe Band / Gardner / Bugler / Painter / Cook / Barber cum Hair Dresser / Washer Man & Women / Water Carrier / Safai Karamchari / Mason / Plumber / Electrician): 18-23 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules. | Detailed CRPF Tradesman Eligibility Criteria 2026

selection_process: The recruitment process will consist of Physical Efficiency Test (PET)
Physical Efficiency Test (PET): Qualifying in nature. For Constable (Driver
Tailor & Bugler): Male – 5 Kms race in 24 minutes; Female – 1.6 Kms in 8.30 minutes. For Constable (Cook/Water Carrier

Safai Karmachari): Male – 1.6 Kms in 10 minutes; Female – 1.6 Kms in 12 minutes. For Pioneer Wing (Mason / Electrician): Male – 1.6 Kms in 09 minutes. Pregnant women candidates will be declared temporarily unfit. Physical Standards Test (PST): Height
Chest (for males only) & Weight (proportionate to height & age). Height: Male – 170 Cms (minimum); Female – 157 Cms (minimum). Relaxations applicable for certain categories (ST
Minimum expansion – 05 Cms. Relaxations applicable. Candidates failing PST will be eliminated. Computer Based Test (CBT): 100 marks (100 MCQs)

duration 02 hours. General Intelligence & Reasoning – 25 Qs / 25 Marks General Knowledge & General Awareness – 25 Qs / 25 Marks Elementary Mathematics – 25 Qs / 25 Marks English/Hindi – 25 Qs / 25 Marks Negative marking of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer. Qualifying marks: UR – 30%
SC/ST & others – 20%. Marks will be normalized. Merit list prepared on CBT marks. Trade/Skill Test: Qualifying in nature (50 marks
minimum 20 marks required). Practical assessment of the applied trade/post. Document Verification (DV): Original documents (Matric certificate

etc.) will be verified. Detailed Medical Examination (DME) / Review Medical Examination (RME): As per Uniform Guidelines issued by MHA. Temporary unfitness allowed only for pregnancy. Final selection subject to medical fitness. Final merit list prepared on the basis of marks obtained in CBT (subject to qualifying all stages). Separate merit lists for male/female and each State/UT (All India basis for Pioneer posts).
how_to_apply: Application Mode: Online only through CRPF website. No other mode will be accepted.
Click on the link for “Recruitment for the post of Constable (Technical & Tradesmen and Pioneer) 2026”.
Register by providing basic details and generate Provisional Registration Number & Password.
Fill the online application form carefully (personal details, educational qualification, trade/post applied, State/UT of domicile, etc.).
Upload scanned copies of recent colour passport size photograph, signature, left thumb impression and handwritten declaration as per specifications.
Pay the application fee online (if applicable) through BHIM, UPI, Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card or CSC Wallet.
Submit the application and take printout of the application form & e-receipt for future reference.
Candidates should bring two coloured printouts of the Admit Card at every stage of examination.

faq.question: Q1. Who is eligible for CRPF Constable Tradesmen Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates who are Indian citizens, passed Class 10, meet trade‑wise physical and technical standards, and are within 18–23 years (21–27 years for Driver posts) with applicable category relaxations are eligible.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in CRPF Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 9,195 vacancies have been notified for CRPF Constable (Technical & Tradesmen and Pioneer) posts across various trades under this recruitment drive. These posts are open for eligible male and female candidates from different categories, with reservations applicable as per government rules for UR, OBC, SC, ST, and EWS candidates. This CRPF Tradesman recruitment is one of the biggest opportunities in recent years for aspirants seeking a secure defence and paramilitary government job at the Constable level.

faq.question: Q3. What are the online application dates for CRPF Constable Online Form 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window will be open from 20 April 2026 to 19 May 2026 on the official recruitment portal rect.crpf.gov.in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CRPF Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs 100 for General, OBC and EWS male candidates, while SC, ST, all female candidates and Ex‑servicemen are exempted from paying any fee; payment must be made online through debit/credit card, net banking, UPI or similar modes.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for CRPF Constable Technical & Tradesmen and Pioneer posts?
faq.answer: For Constable (Driver), the age limit is 21 to 27 years, and for other Technical & Tradesmen including Pioneer trades it is 18 to 23 years as on 01 January 2026, with age relaxation for reserved categories as per Government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What educational qualifications are required for CRPF Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 10 (Matriculation) from a recognized board; additionally, Driver requires a valid Heavy Transport Vehicle licence, Motor Mechanic Vehicle requires ITI in the relevant trade plus one year experience, other trades require trade proficiency, and Pioneer Wing posts (Mason/Electrician) need Matric and one year experience (ITI preferred).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process and exam pattern for CRPF Constable Technical & Tradesmen 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves PET, PST, Computer Based Test (100 questions, 2 hours, 0.25 negative marking), Trade/Skill Test, Document Verification and Medical Examination; CBT is of 100 marks with sections on General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge, Elementary Mathematics and English/Hindi.

faq.question: Q8. What are the PET and PST requirements for CRPF Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For trades like Driver, MMV, Gardner, Painter, Carpenter, Brass/Pipe Band, Cobbler, Tailor and Bugler, male candidates must run 5 km in 24 minutes and females 1.6 km in 8.30 minutes; for Cook, Water Carrier, Barber, Washerman and Safai Karmchari, males must run 1.6 km in 10 minutes and females 1.6 km in 12 minutes; Pioneer (Mason/Electrician) males must run 1.6 km in 9 minutes.

faq.question: Q9. What is the pay scale for CRPF Constable Tradesmen & Pioneer posts?
faq.answer: All selected Constable (Technical, Tradesmen and Pioneer) candidates will receive salary in Pay Level‑3 of the 7th CPC with a basic pay range of Rs 21,700 to Rs 69,100 plus allowances as per Central Government norms.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for CRPF Constable (Technical & Tradesmen and Pioneer) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must visit rect.crpf.gov.in, register with basic details, log in to fill the application form with personal, educational and trade‑wise information, upload photo, signature, thumb impression and declaration, pay the fee (if applicable), submit the form and take a printout of the final application and e‑receipt for future reference.
